rows.text: I am absolutely furious and enraged; this is unacceptable and I will not stand for it.
rows.response_R: I hear that you are angry. What do you mean by "I will not stand for it"?

rows.text: That is completely disgusting, I feel revolted and sickened by what I am seeing.
rows.response_R: Is it a bad thing to be seeing what you're seeing, or is it disgusting?

rows.text: I am terrified and panicked; I feel deep fear and anxiety about this situation right now.
rows.response_R: I hear you are scared and anxious about this situation right now. What is the cause of your fear?

rows.text: I am overjoyed and delighted; I could not be happier with this amazing wonderful news today!
rows.response_R: I hear that you are happy and excited. What do you mean by "overjoyed"?

rows.text: I feel heartbroken, deeply sad, and I could cry; everything feels gray and empty to me.
rows.response_R: Is everything gray and empty to me? (i) Yes. (ii) No.

rows.text: I am so shocked and surprised I can barely process what just happened, this is incredible.
rows.response_R: I hear that you're so shocked and surprised I can barely process what just happened, this is incredible.

rows.text: It is a normal quiet day; I feel pretty neutral and nothing in particular is happening to me.
rows.response_R: Is it a normal quiet day, or is there something in particular happening to me?
